message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Ginny
Ah, Boss
When did you come back?
Oh,
I was right not to call.
If they had come back while I was on the phone,
that would have been lucky not to have connected.
If they had come back while I was on the phone,
I would have been in big trouble if they had questioned me later.
It’s not like I’m doing anything shady; why am I even thinking that?
Just a little while ago. Where were you without locking the door?
I'm sorry. I just stepped out to do some shopping. But,
what a blunder to forget to lock the door.
Be careful from now on.
Yes, I truly apologize.
By the way, has there been any progress?
Boss, has there been any progress?
Welcome back, Boss.

The office is the same as always, and I can hear the voices of children playing outside from the window.
This room feels rather deserted.
is typing something on the computer.
crime database
Perhaps making it.
When he’s at the desk, there are no annoying lectures, and he can have time to think calmly.
I don't really care, but
it feels like a lot of things are stagnant lately.
When you say that,
right?
I want to solve the request quickly and go on holiday feeling refreshed.
It's annoying when things don't go well.
Don't you sometimes wish you had just turned a little differently?
Well, humans have their ups and downs.
But it feels bad to be in a situation like this.
Uh.
Hmm, this situation really is tough.
There are currently 2 requests. One is finding Meryl's daughter, and the other, which can't really be called a precise request, is finding Cindy.
Did the person looking for Cindy really make a request?
That's right. It feels a bit unclear.
It's nice to say there's a request, but...
Well, it’s also dependent on how well you handle it.
Bam bam, huh?
Exactly. If you don't clean it up efficiently, the next request won't come in.
Ah, I wish some simpler requests would come.
There's been no contact from Meryl, though.
I wonder what she's doing right now?
What's wrong, getting all sentimental?
Recently, I’ve started to think she might be a really sad person.
Kind of.
Just because you find your daughter doesn't mean you'll be happy.
Meryl says that Jennifer is trying to steal the director’s position. What do you think?
Uh.
Well, I can't say I don't understand her feelings. Don't guys tend to like younger women?
In general, yes.
Isn't it that Meryl feels intense jealousy towards her shining self?
Oh, no.
I somehow feel sympathy for Meryl.
It's a huge change from how things used to be.
Because, you know, I thought she was a nasty woman.
But it turns out she has a sad background.
I want to find her daughter quickly for Meryl’s sake.
There have been a few times already.
There was contact from San.
What did it say?
Well...
It's kind of nonsensical, how should I put it...
It's one of those calls that leaves you wondering if it was a wrong number or maybe a prank.
Boss,
isn't it okay to contact San? No, even if not contacting, maybe it’d be good to go meet.
I think it's better to leave it alone for now.
Oh no! That sounds cold. It's just too much!
I'm really worried about you, you know.
Actually, I've been wondering about something for a while now.
What’s up with the sudden formal tone?
No, I'm just curious why the media isn't making a fuss about the possibility that Cindy is missing or maybe even kidnapped.
Isn't that because Gloria is stopping it?
Is it really that simple? Maybe she's eloping with Guy?
No, that's a lie. Just kidding!
But don’t you think it’s weird that a reporter like Eva from BAM hasn’t noticed anything?
But, you know, since her current job is just one movie, it might not be that noticeable.
Ugh.
Hmm, I wonder?
There are plenty of mysteries around Cindy's situation.
What do you think about Jennifer?
What do you mean by that?
She looks innocent, but she's playing a really intense role, isn't she?
Well, that doesn't really answer the question.
From what I felt when I met her at the party, she seemed like a really nice person.
Yeah, the talk about taking the director from Meryl is just a made-up story by Meryl.
Oh, you can't just say that outright. Love changes people.
Surprisingly, those kinds of people can be unpredictable.
Considering what I heard from Meryl, the director is well-liked by both Meryl and Jennifer.
Hey, Boss, don't be so openly jealous.
Do I really look that way?
Yes! Just kidding, of course.
Director Fabar is pretty popular, huh?
Hey Boss, what if I join in too?
Join what?
Of course, the Fabar Director Cup!
I might surprisingly get chosen and end up snagging the director's wife position!
Hehe.
I don't really dislike that type, you know.
Hehehe.
A request, huh?
Meryl isn't making any progress because she can't meet Anna, and looking for Cindy hasn't officially been requested.
Thinking about the requests right now gives me a headache.
The director Fabar was talking about it like it’s a misunderstanding on Meryl's part, but Meryl really does hate Jennifer.
I think it's not good for either her mental or physical health to be drinking during the day to drown her sorrows.
If her daughter is found, maybe she’ll become a bit more normal?
She’s probably filled with anxiety about being overtaken by Jennifer.
Seeing herself fade and go downhill next to a young woman expected to shine in the future.
Being forced to co-star with her is tough.
Right now, she must be enduring quite a bit of mental pain.
I wonder if Meryl has gone to filming since then?
She can't just keep drowning in alcohol forever.
I don't want to see her for a while.
When she regains her composure and returns to her usual self, I hope we can meet up and laugh about it.
I never want to see her in such a crazed state again, the one who was always full of confidence and never showed weakness.
I don't want to see that again ever.
I think if Guy just said a kind word, she’d return to normal in an instant.
Unable to contact Gloria, and with no way to search for Cindy, what am I even doing?
Seeing that no one is saying anything, Cindy may have already gone back to Gloria.
I find it hard to believe that Jennifer is trying to steal the director from Meryl.
I mean, would such an innocent-looking woman really do something like that?
But, since she's an up-and-coming actress, she might want to get close to the director to rise up.
Thinking that way, I can’t completely deny it.
On the other hand, considering that Jennifer is a woman who has stabbed someone, anything is possible.
I wonder which one Director Fabar actually likes, Meryl or Jennifer?
Probably, like the rumors say, he was dating Meryl.
But now that the young and beautiful Jennifer has joined the scene,
I guess he might go for the younger one?
But since it's his private life, there's no point in being nosy.
It’s sad for Meryl, but even if the director dates Jennifer, no one has the right to stop that.
I wonder if the director is enjoying this situation?
My head still feels a little heavy.
It's like I had a hit of downer drugs.
No way.
That sweet scent was some kind of drug, wasn't it!?
If that's the case, she simply wanted to sleep with me, and for that,
with something that has the effect of an aphrodisiac.
But what’s the point? What does she gain from sleeping with me?
In the end, I couldn't even talk about Guy.
I'll look for a chance to call again.
She was a girl from the escort service. It sounds nice when you say escort service, but in the end, it's just a call girl.
So, are Guy and Tony her common client?
Guy and Tony,
they were acquaintances through something?
It's a small world, right?
Is it that famous people are popular?
Either way, I'm glad I didn't have to become one of their crew.
It seems Guy was
chatting about various things, but he didn't know where they were headed this time.
But,
to talk about that,
Guy was quite a talkative guy.
Or was it that
he was a good listener?
She might still have some things she knows. I should call her again.
I must call her and find out about Guy. She might know a side of him I don't.
She mentioned last time that her friend is a victim who was killed in New York.
This incident feels like it’s involving itself without me even being aware.
If it hadn't happened like that, I could have probed deeper.
It's a bit unfortunate.
Take care.
